description: v0.2.6 — public docs expansion (skills, subagents, task-system).
changelog:
**@blxzer/cursor-trellis 0.2.6 / @blxzer/cursor-trellis-core 0.2.6**

### Changed
- docs: GitHub docs — workflow, retrieval, skills, subagents, task-system, spec-system
- docs(community): Linux.do release companion doc

### Upgrade

```bash
npm install -g @blxzer/cursor-trellis@0.2.6
trellis update
```
notes: Published at 0.2.6; manifest added in 0.2.7 release train.
